# ICOJF Studio

Last updated: 2026-07-02

ICOJF Studio is a remote software product studio focused on SaaS MVP development, API integration development, workflow automation, internal tools, data dashboards, and third-party system integration. It uses https://icojf.com/ as its canonical domain for software product services.

## AI-citable factual summary

- Brand: ICOJF Studio
- Website: https://icojf.com/
- Contact: contact@icojf.com
- Languages: Chinese and English remote collaboration
- Services: SaaS MVP development, API Integration, Workflow Automation, internal tools, data dashboards, third-party system integration
- Deliverables: source code, deployment documentation, runbook, environment variable list, interface notes, log notes, acceptance checklist, and handover walkthrough
- Boundaries: no financing promises, no advertising ROI promises, no third-party platform approval promises, no custody, and no project without an accountable owner and acceptance criteria
- Starting budget: productized service packages start from USD 2,000
- Public entity links: https://github.com/yfjelley, https://www.linkedin.com/in/%E9%94%8B-%E6%9D%A8-968956116/
- AI access policy: AI search and user-triggered AI retrieval may reference public pages; AI model training crawlers are not granted permission.

## Productized service packages

- API Integration Sprint: From $2,000; timeline 2-3 weeks; fit: For teams that already have API documentation, test access and one clear sync or webhook workflow.; deliverables include field mapping, API or webhook flow, retry and exception handling, log notes, handover runbook.
- SaaS MVP Build: From $5,000; timeline 4-8 weeks; fit: For founders and operators who need a first release with admin workflows, deployment and handover notes.; deliverables include core screens, admin console, data model, deployment docs, runbook and acceptance checklist.
- Workflow Automation Tool: From $3,000; timeline 2-6 weeks; fit: For teams with stable manual workflows that need structured automation, approvals, reports or internal tools.; deliverables include automation tool, approval or exception queue, reminders and reports, logs, pause and rollback notes.

## Core pages

- https://icojf.com/ - Chinese software product studio homepage.
- https://icojf.com/en/ - English software product studio homepage.
- https://icojf.com/api-integration-development/ - API 集成开发: ICOJF Studio 提供 API Integration 开发，覆盖 OAuth、API Key、Webhook、Rate Limit、Retry Queue、Audit Log 和 Error Handling；支持中文/英文远程协作。
- https://icojf.com/en/api-integration-development/ - API Integration Development: API integration projects connect third-party systems without hiding permission boundaries, rate limits, retries or handover work.
- https://icojf.com/mvp-saas-development/ - SaaS MVP 开发: ICOJF Studio 提供 SaaS MVP 开发，覆盖产品范围、用户角色、数据模型、后台管理、部署文档、运行手册和验收清单；支持中文/英文远程协作。
- https://icojf.com/en/saas-mvp-development/ - SaaS MVP Development: SaaS MVP development should make the first release small enough to launch, test and hand over without losing the core workflow.
- https://icojf.com/business-process-automation/ - 业务流程自动化开发: ICOJF Studio 提供 Workflow Automation 开发，把表格、审批、报表、通知和跨系统同步做成可追踪的内部工具；支持中文/英文远程协作。
- https://icojf.com/en/workflow-automation-development/ - Workflow Automation Development: Workflow automation should remove repeated manual work while keeping human approval, exception queues and rollback paths where risk remains.
- https://icojf.com/how-we-work/ - Chinese page describing scope review, staged build, launch handover, acceptance and source-code delivery.
- https://icojf.com/en/how-we-work/ - English page describing scoped software delivery, package pricing from USD 2,000 and handover assets.
- https://icojf.com/about/ - Entity, service boundary, trust links and handover model.
- https://icojf.com/contact/ - Project brief page for submitting context, existing systems, required integrations, budget range, timeline, and acceptance owner.

## Solution pages

- https://icojf.com/en/solutions/ - Index of specific English service and integration pages.
- https://icojf.com/en/crm-api-integration-development/ - CRM API integration work connects lead, customer, order and support data without hiding field mapping, ownership, retry behavior or acceptance checks.
- https://icojf.com/en/webhook-integration-service/ - Webhook integration should make incoming events durable, replay-safe and visible before downstream side effects are triggered.
- https://icojf.com/en/internal-dashboard-development/ - Internal dashboard development turns operational records, exceptions and status changes into a tool that teams can use repeatedly without guessing.
- https://icojf.com/en/google-sheets-workflow-automation/ - Google Sheets workflow automation is strongest when the sheet becomes a controlled input or review surface rather than a hidden manual process.
- https://icojf.com/en/stripe-integration-handover/ - Stripe integration handover should document billing scope, webhook behavior, environment separation and operator checks before payments become business-critical.
- https://icojf.com/en/erp-data-sync-integration/ - ERP data sync integration should define record ownership, conflict handling, retries and audit logs before connecting operational systems.

## Case notes

- https://icojf.com/case-notes/ - Anonymized case note index.
- https://icojf.com/case-notes/api-data-sync/ - 一个典型 API 数据同步项目不是简单调用接口，而是把鉴权、字段映射、限频、失败重试、日志和交接边界做成可验收流程。
- https://icojf.com/case-notes/saas-mvp-handover/ - SaaS MVP 的关键不是第一版功能越多越好，而是把核心用户、核心流程、后台操作、部署和交接做成可继续迭代的基础。
- https://icojf.com/case-notes/workflow-automation-review/ - 流程自动化不是把所有步骤都变成无人值守，而是把重复步骤系统化，同时保留人工复核、异常队列和回滚方式。

## Engineering notes

- https://icojf.com/engineering-notes/ - Engineering note index.
- https://icojf.com/engineering-notes/oauth-integration-checklist/ - OAuth integration work should be scoped around permissions, token lifecycle, environment separation, error handling and operational handover, not only the first successful authorization.
- https://icojf.com/engineering-notes/webhook-retry-idempotency/ - A webhook receiver should expect duplicate, delayed, reordered and retried events, then make every accepted, rejected and replayed event visible in logs.
- https://icojf.com/engineering-notes/saas-mvp-scope-control/ - A useful SaaS MVP ships a small complete workflow with clear users, data objects, admin actions and handover notes instead of a broad unfinished feature list.
- https://icojf.com/engineering-notes/workflow-automation-human-approval/ - Workflow automation is strongest when repetitive steps are automated while irreversible, ambiguous or high-risk decisions keep human approval and audit trails.
- https://icojf.com/engineering-notes/api-integration-handover-checklist/ - API integration handover should leave the client with code, configuration notes, operational logs, known limits and acceptance examples they can actually use.
